page_intro: Every GoldenHome cabinet is engineered to the highest material standards — because quality should never be a compromise.

cta.heading: Experience the difference
cta.sub: See our material quality in person. Visit a showroom or book a free in-home design consultation.

sections.section1_desc: Our cabinets are constructed with premium-grade plywood — not particle board. Multi-layer cross-grain construction provides superior strength, screw-holding power, and long-term durability that stands up to daily use.
sections.section2_desc: Engineered for kitchens and bathrooms, our sealed melamine finish on all surfaces prevents water penetration, protecting against warping, swelling, and mold — so your cabinets stay beautiful for the long term.
sections.section3_desc: All GoldenHome materials are CARB II compliant — meeting California's strict formaldehyde emission standards. Eco-friendly finishes and responsibly sourced materials mean a healthier home and a healthier planet.
sections.section3_tags: CARB II Compliant, Low Emission, Responsible Sourcing
